description: '''Afroswing''', also known as '''Afrobashment''', or less commonly '''Afrobbean''' or '''Afro-trap''' (not to be confused with the [[Afrobeats#Afro trap|French genre]]), is a genre of music that developed in the [[United Kingdom|UK]] during the mid-2010s, derivative primarily of West African musical traditions such as [[Afrobeats]] or [[Afrobeat]], but also with influences from [[Dancehall]], [[Grime music|Grime]], [[Trap music|trap]], [[UK rap|hip hop]] and [[Contemporary R&B|R&B]]. Commercially, the genre has been very successful, with many afroswing artists making it into the [[Official Charts Company|British charts]].
